title: Create Aeronautics Lift Patch
description: Attempts to fix the Sable lift calculation to be the proper quadratic increase with velocity for better Aerodynamics in Create Aeronautics.
body:
Changes the Sable lift and drag calculations to properly calculate it as a quadratic increase with velocity rather than the linear it currently is.
This should make it easier to make both large and small planes in Aeronautics since you wont need as much wing area to generate lift.

This is the first mod I have ever made and I only did some light testing with it, if the coefficients are a little off they can be changed in the ldfix config.
There is also no guarantee I will continue to update this as later versions come out.

Dependencies:
Sable - https://modrinth.com/mod/sable
Create - https://modrinth.com/mod/create
Create Aeronautics - https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics

Original physics code credit goes to the Sable team

**
Known issue: Copycat sails from the copycat sails mod produce excessive lift.
This occurs due to them having another multiplier to help their wings fly with the original wing calculation.
- Current solution: Change the lift scalar in the copycat sails compat mod config from 1.75 to 0.75 for better results.
